b:T96e,<p><strong>MELT FESTIVAL @ Cloud 11 &mdash; WAVE 1 ANNOUNCEMENT&nbsp;</strong></p><p>21 November 2026 (Saturday)</p><hr><p>Tickets available now via Ticketmelon<br><strong>remark:</strong> we are a one day festival. 🧡</p><hr><p><strong>TICKETS (WAVE 1): </strong></p><p>Early Bird &mdash; 799 THB&nbsp;</p><p>General Admission &mdash; 1,200 THB&nbsp;</p><p>Melt Deluxe &mdash; 1,500 THB&nbsp;</p><p>VVIP &mdash; 2,500 THB&nbsp;</p><p><em>*price will increase every wave*</em></p><hr><p><strong>LINEUP (WAVE 1):&nbsp;</strong></p><p>YOUNGOHM&nbsp;</p><p>Yellow Fang&nbsp;</p><p>Phum Viphurit</p><p>Solitude Is Bliss&nbsp;</p><p>Yew&nbsp;</p><p>Safeplanet&nbsp;</p><p>Television Off&nbsp;</p><p>SLUR</p><p>CORNBOI&nbsp;</p><p>Moving and Cut&nbsp;</p><p>Yented&nbsp;</p><p>Whal &amp; Dolph&nbsp;</p><p>Younggu + Diamond MQT + Gunner&nbsp;</p><p>Srirajah Rockers&nbsp;</p><p>+ more</p><hr><p><strong>PERKS&nbsp;</strong></p><p><strong>Melt Deluxe:&nbsp;</strong></p><p>&bull; Event Poster&nbsp;</p><p>&bull; VIP Viewing Zone Access&nbsp;</p><p>&bull; 15% discount for &ldquo;Road to Melt Festival&rdquo; on 15.8 *line up to be announced*</p><p><strong>VVIP:&nbsp;</strong></p><p>&bull; Event Poster&nbsp;</p><p>&bull; VIP Viewing Zone Access&nbsp;</p><p>&bull; Soundcheck Access&nbsp;</p><p>&bull; Official Festival Shirt&nbsp;</p><p>&bull; 15% discount for &ldquo;Road to Melt Festival&rdquo; on 15.8 *line up to be announced*</p><hr><p>All Ages Welcome</p><p><em><u>Festival map and more details will be announced in WAVE 2 (also 21 November, we are a one day festival)</u></em></p><hr><p><strong>วิธีเดินทางมา Cloud 11 &nbsp;</strong></p><p>Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/chH5mE43hD4Vkc326?g_st=ic &nbsp;</p><p>BTS ปุณณวิถี &rarr; ทางออก 6 เดิน Skywalk ประมาณ 5 นาที</p><p>BTS อุดมสุข &rarr; ทางออก 2 เดินประมาณ 6 นาที &nbsp;</p><p>สามารถจอดรถที่ Cloud 11 หรือ True Digital Park แล้วเดิน Skywalk เชื่อมถึงกันได้ &nbsp;</p><hr><p><strong>กดบัตรได้ที่: &nbsp;</strong></p><p><a href="https://www.ticketmelon.com/meltlivehouse/meltfestival/">https://www.ticketmelon.com/meltlivehouse/meltfestival/&nbsp;</a></p><p>#MeltFestival</p><p>#MeltLivehouse</p><p>#Cloud11</p>e:{"d":"M8 2v4","key":"1cmpym"}
